'''Kailor V''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kailor system/Legends|Kailor system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]]. It was the location of the [[Imperial Zoological Gardens]],<ref name="A" /> the aquaria of which were maintained by the [[Sedrian]] [[Shahlik family]]. The [[Design Team Beta]] research facility of [[Hydrospeare Corporation]] was also on Kailor V.
